companies.name: Apple Inc.
companies.summary: Apple is a consumer technology platform company centered on its ecosystem, with Services as a high-growth engine (26.2% of revenue, 70% margins) and Apple Silicon as a technology moat. FY2025 revenue of $416.2B with 23 billion active devices drives strong network effects.

companies.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
companies.summary: Amazon is the world's largest multi-platform tech company spanning e-commerce, AWS cloud infrastructure (31% global market share), and digital advertising (3rd largest globally). AWS generates 57% of operating profit on 18% of revenue, while retail flywheel effects continue strengthening.

companies.name: Costco Wholesale Corporation
companies.summary: Costco operates a premium warehouse club model with exceptional member loyalty (92.9% renewal rate) and Kirkland Signature private label (25% of sales) driving deep moat. FY2025 revenue of $275.2B with membership fees converting nearly entirely to profit.

companies.name: eBay Inc.
companies.summary: eBay has transformed from a general marketplace into a focused enthusiast economy platform specializing in high-value categories (automotive, collectibles, luxury). FY2025 GMV of $79.6B with take rate expanded to 14.0% and AI tools driving 50%+ improvement in listing acceleration.

companies.name: Alphabet Inc.
companies.summary: Alphabet dominates digital search (90% global market share) and operates YouTube as the leading video platform, while Google Cloud is the 2nd largest cloud provider growing 25%+ annually. 2024 revenue of $350B with Gemini AI reshaping the entire product portfolio.

companies.name: Eli Lilly and Company
companies.summary: Eli Lilly dominates the GLP-1 receptor agonist market with tirzepatide (Mounjaro/Zepbound), which generated $36.5B in 2025 revenue (56% of total). The GLP-1 TAM is expected to grow from $63B to $254B by 2034 as obesity treatment penetration accelerates.

companies.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
companies.summary: TSMC is the world's most advanced semiconductor foundry and irreplaceable to AI chip production, controlling 90%+ of advanced process (7nm and below) manufacturing. 2024 HPC/AI revenue exceeded 50% of total as company leads global AI infrastructure buildout with $52-56B annual CapEx.
